root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as retire_date , pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, localtimestamp) as age_mem from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_close_year where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and ((to_char( pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ,'yyyy'))::numeric) = ((to_char( sc_lon_m_close_year.end_date ,'yyyy'))::numeric)
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_close_year.lon_year = 2022 --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '053681' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
